subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and glory, and the quintessence of remembrance and splendor, beseemeth the Lord, the Self-Subsisting, Who from the sealed wine hath quickened them that lie in the graves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و ثنا و ساذج ذکر و بها حضرت قیومی را سزاست که از رحیق مختوم اهل قبور
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
